arts.ttl: Brighton meet player’s agent in at Grand Hyatt hotel – Transfer offer can now be lodged
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion met with agent Giuliano Bertolucci last week to discuss a move for Flamengo’s Matheus Gonçalves. That’s according to RTI Esporte, who report that the 23-year-old may have his ‘days numbered’ at the Brazilian club after Brighton took the first step forward. They explain that Flamengo intend to negotiate for the striker The post Brighton meet player’s agent in at Grand Hyatt hotel – Transfer offer can now be lodged appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Evan Ferguson to Arsenal? The state of play revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal have been linked with a potential move for Brighton striker Evan Ferguson as the January transfer window approaches, with the Gunners having searched for a centre-forward since the summer. Brighton are thought to be ready to allow Republic of Ireland international Ferguson to depart on a loan deal in January, with the 20-year-old forward having struggled to gain the favour of head coach Fabian Hurzeler following injury issues.
